faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Pelham Bay?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Pelham Bay residents. Most drain fly treatments can be scheduled within 24 hours of your call, and our technicians typically complete the service in 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation.

faqs.question: What does your drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes a thorough inspection to identify breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatments to eliminate larvae and organic buildup, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, and follow-up recommendations to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my Pelham Bay home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, pipes, and areas with standing water. Many Pelham Bay properties, especially older buildings, experience drain flies due to slow drains, infrequently used bathrooms, or moisture issues in basements and kitchens.

faqs.question: Is the drain fly treatment safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use eco-friendly, non-toxic treatments that are safe for families and pets. Our bio-enzymatic solutions break down organic matter naturally without harsh chemicals, and you can resume normal use of treated areas immediately after service.
